summary_analyst: CVE-2024-21182 is a vulnerability in Oracle Weblogic Server that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTTP request due to improper input validation in the affected component.
summary_ciso: CVE-2024-21182 poses an urgent risk to Oracle WebLogic Server, potentially allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code, which could severely impact business operations and expose critical data if not promptly mitigated.
description: CVE-2024-21182 is a vulnerability in Oracle Weblogic Server that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTTP request due to improper input validation in the affected component.
